def solve(grid : Array(Array(Int64)), k : Int64) : Int64
    count = 0
    m = grid.length
    n = grid[0].length if m > 0 else 0
    for i in 0...m
        for j in 0...n
            if grid[i][j] > 0
                queue = [[i, j]]
                original_value = grid[i][j]
                sum = original_value
                grid[i][j] = 0
                while queue.size > 0
                    x, y = queue.shift!
                    for dx, dy in [[-1, 0], [1, 0], [0, -1], [0, 1]]
                        nx = x + dx
                        ny = y + dy
                        if nx >= 0 && nx < m && ny >= 0 && ny < n && grid[nx][ny] > 0
                            original_value = grid[nx][ny]
                            sum += original_value
                            grid[nx][ny] = 0
                            queue.push([nx, ny])
                        end
                    end
                end
                if sum % k == 0
                    count += 1
                end
            end
        end
    end
    count
end
